description: sandals for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, cut a dash with this pair at any upscale do. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper with T-straps at the midfoot Leather toe separator Stitch and strap detailing on the straps for durability and style Padded suede footbed with stitch detailing for instep comfort Outsole Branching lugs on the TPR outsole with a raised heel Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability Sandal care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
